sources.title: Gartner Magic Quadrant: Full Lifecycle API Management
Kong: State of the API Landscape 2024
Postman State of the API Report 2024

result.summary: The global API management market is projected to grow from $6.2B in 2024 to $14.8B by 2028 at a 24.3% CAGR, driven by microservices adoption, API-first architectures, and the explosion of AI model APIs requiring gateway and observability infrastructure.
key_findings: AI/ML API management is the fastest-growing segment at 45% CAGR, driven by enterprises needing to manage, rate-limit, and monitor access to multiple LLM providers
Cloud-native API gateways are displacing traditional API management platforms, with Kong, Envoy-based solutions, and AWS API Gateway capturing 52% of new deployments
API security and governance represent 30% of market spend as organizations average 15,000+ APIs in production with only 40% having complete API inventories
